mapper.select:
SELECT 'bigdata_usr' || (case length((num + 1)::text)::integer when 1 then '000000' when 2 then '00000' when 3 then '0000' when 4 then '000' when 5 then '00' when 6 then '0' when 7 then '' end) || num + 1 AS val,
(case length((num + 1)::text)::integer when 1 then '000000' when 2 then '00000' when 3 then '0000' when 4 then '000' when 5 then '00' when 6 then '0' when 7 then '' end) || num + 1 AS idx FROM generate_series( (SELECT coalesce(substring(max(layer_id), 12)::numeric, 0) FROM xeus.bigdata_analydata WHERE layer_id like '${type}%'), (SELECT coalesce(substring(max(layer_id), 12)::numeric, 0) FROM xeus.bigdata_analydata WHERE layer_id like '${type}%') ) AS num
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS xeus.${value} CASCADE;
